subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! That which thou didst write to Manshádí hath been received, and in view of a wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی آنچه بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی رسید و چون نظر بحکمتی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @war and peace, @nationalism; love of country, @religion as source of love and unity, @love and unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
